title: [1.21.10] Foodie’s Pak ❄️
description: 240+ actually useful quality-of-life additions to your favorite game
body:
⚠️ **SOME OF THESE MODS MAY BE CONSIDERED BY SERVERS TO BE CHEATS. PLEASE USE WITH CAUTION ON PUBLIC SERVERS** ⚠️



## What is This?

I've been having a problem with Minecraft recently as it just seems too bland, so I created this modpack to try to fix that (and it works!).

This specific modpack is designed for server + client. You WILL experience bugs if you try to play using this modpack on a server without the same mods installed.

This pack is designed primarly for play with the required server side mods installed server side. Servers that you join may break due to incompatabilities
## Why use this modpack?

Compared to other vanilla packs with at most 30 mods, my pack has over 170 mods providing the most variation and improvement to your favorite game (which I hope is Minecraft!).

* ❗️ Regular Updates

* ⚡️ Optimization

* 🏢 Better Structures

* 🔨 QoL Features

* 💡 Improved Graphics 

* ➕ And More!

##  Totally Accurate Reviews

"It made my Dad come back" - MinecraftPlayer123

---
"My GPA improved from a 2.0 to a 2.01" - HarvardStudent

---
"I like cows" - MIfoodie

<details>
<summary>⚠️ More Disclaimers </summary>

⚠️**All rights to the mods are given to the original creator, I am not claiming rights to any of these mods. If you would like me to take your mod down, send me a message via Discord @MIfoodie or submit a issue via the link to the left.**

⚠️ **There is no overall license for this pack as I do not own each mod and the mods have different licenses. Please refer to the individual mods for usage rights. Attribution to mods can be found by clicking a version and scrolling all the way down**


</details>

*🐶Good boy! You read the whole thing!*
